{{Quote|To our BLs, that they may leave enough enemies for the rest of us. Raise your cup to victory! ''Kote''!|[[Toast (ritual)/Legends|Toast]] of the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]], prior to the battle|<ref name="NEGTD" />}}
The '''Battle of New Bornalex''' took place in [[20 BBY/Legends|19.42 BBY]], during the last [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], as part of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]].

==The battle==
A [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] army made up of [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]], [[BL-series Battle Legionnaire]]s and other various [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] executed a stunning blitzkrieg against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] targets at [[New Bornalex/Legends|New Bornalex]].

One well documented skirmish that took place during this battle involved the [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]]. While engaging [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]], the weapons systems of the Marines' prototype [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetrooper]] armor failed. Nevertheless, the Galactic Marines fought on, literally tearing their enemies apart with the enhanced strength granted to them by their power armor. This engagement gave the Galactic Marines a fierce reputation.
